entities.name: AZTECS
entities.description: Precursors of the Aztecs of Mexico who built large-scale water management systems

entities.name: MEXICO
entities.description: Country in the New World where the Tehuacan Valley is located

entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Large-scale systems designed to control and distribute water

entities.name: CANAL NETWORK
entities.description: A specific prehistoric water management system located in the Tehuacan Valley

entities.name: TEHUACAN VALLEY
entities.description: A region in southern Mexico containing the largest known prehistoric water management system in the New World

entities.name: NEW WORLD
entities.description: The Americas, where the Tehuacan Valley water management system is located

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The state of being short of water, which was relatively unknown in prehistoric Tehuacan Valley

entities.name: FOOD SCARCITY
entities.description: The state of being short of food, which was relatively unknown in prehistoric Tehuacan Valley

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Tropical regions with limited rainfall inhabited by millions of poor people

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of extreme economic hardship faced by inhabitants of the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: PARCHED LANDS
entities.description: Extremely dry and degraded land conditions in the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: DEGRADED NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Natural resources that have suffered a decline in quality or productivity

entities.name: BURGEONING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Rapidly increasing human populations in the semi-arid tropics

entities.name: RAINY-SEASON CROP
entities.description: Crops grown specifically during the rainy season

entities.name: DEGRADED LANDS
entities.description: Lands that have lost their biological or chemical productivity

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The basic physical and organizational structures of a society, described as being in an abysmal state
